---
title: "Score-Based Generative Model on a Real Dataset with OT-Guided Sampling"
date: 2026-06-10
categories: [GDL + COT]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)]()
- [Mathematical Framework](mathematical_framework.md)

---
